allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Major update: Legal compliance, cookie consent, performance optimizations

- Add cookie consent popup \(LGPD compliance\)
- Add /reembolso \(refund policy\) page
- Add /consentimento \(consent terms\) page
- Update /termos with full legal terms
- Update landing page copy for ad compliance:
  - Remove GLP-1/medication mentions from headlines
  - Remove weight numbers from testimonials
  - Focus on "health program with medical support"
- Add /original page with previous marketing copy
- Optimize images \(convert PNG to WebP, compress\)
- Defer third-party scripts \(PostHog, Leadster\)
- Add lazy loading to images
- Update meta tags and SEO keywords
- Update footer with stronger disclaimers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Major update: Legal compliance, cookie consent, performance optimizations

- Add cookie consent popup \(LGPD compliance\)
- Add /reembolso \(refund policy\) page
- Add /consentimento \(consent terms\) page  
- Update /termos with full legal terms
- Update landing page copy for ad compliance:
  - Remove GLP-1/medication mentions from headlines
  - Remove weight numbers from testimonials
  - Focus on health program with medical support
- Add /original page with previous marketing copy
- Optimize images \(convert PNG to WebP, compress\)
- Defer third-party scripts \(PostHog, Leadster\)
- Add lazy loading to images
- Update meta tags and SEO keywords

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
